notes: ~10-15% of high-grade OS co-amplifies MDM2+CDK4 (12q); DDLPS carries the same amplicon. Site is the canonical tiebreaker — bone-site means OS not LPS.
EWS-FLI1 ectopically activates FATE1/NR0B1 via GGAA microsatellites. DSRCT carries intratumoral WT1 expression from EWSR1-WT1. ARMS requires myogenic-lineage expression from PAX3-FOXO1.

NE markers CHGA/SYP/ENO2 are shared across all well- and poorly-differentiated NETs; anatomic origin distinguishes pancreatic vs midgut vs lung carcinoid vs LCNEC. SSTR2 expression consistent across axis, not diagnostic.
All three carry KRT5/6 + TP63 + SOX2 squamous signature; site distinguishes tissue of origin. HPV-p16 status would further separate HNSC/CESC from LUSC but currently not in bulk-RNA pipeline.

CCND1 translocation drives MCL and is almost pathognomonic at the expression level. BCL6/LMO2 signal germinal-center origin (FL). CLL lacks both but carries CD5+ mature-B signature; ZAP70 + CD38 are prognostic rather than diagnostic.

NUT carcinoma arises midline (sinonasal/mediastinal/supraglottic) and carries BRD4-NUTM1 (60-70%) or NSD3/BRD3-NUTM1. NUTM1 itself is nearly silent in normal tissues — expression >1 TPM in a squamous-ish sample is diagnostic. ~70% co-express PRAME + broad MAGE-A derepression from BRD4-mediated chromatin opening.
Classifier already uses provisional COAD/READ label when site is ambiguous. Listed here for completeness — the mechanism is the canonical example of site-driven subtype resolution.
